benefits.description: Lost 20 lbs from March to July 2025 (215 to 195 lbs)

side_effects.description: Tirzepatide makes it hard to eat, difficulty hitting protein targets
Poor sleep quality despite no current benzodiazepine use

protocol_notes: Started TRT in March 2025. On Tirzepatide since June 2025. Currently at 7.5mg once weekly. Diet includes 100-125g protein daily, low carb, no processed foods/sugars. Also taking extensive supplement stack: multivitamins, magnesium, vitamin D, vitamin B, L-theanine, L-tyrosine, amino acids, Cialis 5mg daily, Reishi, Lions Mane, Ashwagandha, ALA, ENL, Fiber, Pre/probiotics, Milk Thistle, BROM, DIM, NAC, Zinc, L-Arginine, Fish Oil, Creatine. Starting weight was 215 lbs in March. Goals are to optimize fat loss (particularly lower abdomen), continue cutting while building muscle, and improve anxiety and focus.
